sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74657" key="o)pteuth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπτευτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (ὀπτάὠ</foreign> <sense id="n74657.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forger,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σιδήρου,</foreign> of Hephaestus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4081.tlg001.perseus-grc1:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Coluth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
